name: Astonish Pet Fresh Floor Cleaner 1ltr
description: Astonish Pet Fresh Floor Cleaner 1L is specially designed for homes with pets, delivering powerful cleaning while remaining safe and gentle for everyday use. It effectively removes pet messes, neutralises odours, and leaves hard floors sparkling clean with a protective finish that helps reduce future marking. Infused with a fresh floral fragrance of geranium and orange blossom , this floor cleaner keeps your home smelling clean and inviting—without harsh chemical smells. When used as directed and allowed to dry fully, it is safe for areas where pets live, play, and rest. Key Features & Benefits Pet-Safe Formula Suitable for households with pets when floors are dry, making it ideal for daily cleaning in pet-friendly homes. Powerful Dirt & Mess Removal Specially formulated to lift and remove pet-related dirt, muddy paw prints, and everyday floor grime. Odour Neutralising Action Eliminates pet odours rather than masking them, leaving a long-lasting fresh floral scent. Protective Floor Coating Leaves a subtle protective layer on floors to help prevent new marks and reduce future cleaning effort. Fast-Drying & No Rinsing Required Dries quickly and requires no rinsing, making cleaning easier and more convenient. Vegan & Cruelty-Free 100% vegan formula and never tested on animals. Suitable Floor Types Designed for sealed hard floors commonly found in pet homes, including: Tiles Laminate Vinyl Sealed wood floors Not suitable for carpets, fabrics, or porous surfaces. Usage Instructions For regular cleaning, mix 2 capfuls (approx. 30ml) with 5 litres of warm water . For heavier soiling, use 4 capfuls (60ml) in 5 litres of water . Apply using a cotton, microfibre, or pad mop. Remove pets during cleaning and allow floors to dry fully before allowing re-entry. No rinsing required. Product Details Volume: 1 Litre (1000ml) Format: Liquid floor cleaner Fragrance: Fresh floral (geranium & orange blossom) Safety Information Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. Always read the label before use. Store away from direct sunlight and follow floor manufacturer care instructions. Ideal For Pet owners looking for a safe, effective, and fresh-smelling floor cleaner that keeps hard floors hygienic while maintaining a comfortable environment for pets. Astonish Pet Fresh Floor Cleaner 1L removes pet messes, neutralises odours, and leaves floors shiny. Pet-safe, floral-scented, vegan, and easy to use.
